title: crassula × flexa
intro: Crassula × flexa, also known as the Jade Necklace or String of Pearls, is a rare and unique succulent plant that is a hybrid of Crassula ovata and Crassula perforata. This plant is prized for its trailing stems and small, round leaves that are often used in decorative arrangements. In terms of medicinal properties, the leaves of Crassula × flexa are said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The leaves can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support overall well-being.
